2026-04-21T09:16:23.5305904Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-21T09:16:23.5306789Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
